records.name: Infantry
records.description: This basic unit of the Hume is inferior in combat, but consumes little mana.

records.name: Panzer
records.description: This ironclad soldier moves very slowly, but provides high Defense, an advantage over lightweight horsemen units like Cavalry and Scouts.

records.name: Cavalry
records.description: This unit has fast Movement and Attack Speeds, making it ideal to deal with low-defense units or to raid the enemy tower.

records.name: Hunter
records.description: Specialized in aerial and long-ranged attacks. It is inferior in close quarters combat due to its low HP .

records.name: Gliders
records.description: Throws javelins from the air. Use it to attack the enemy's infantry units without risk, or to destroy the enemy tower without interference.

records.name: Thief
records.description: This unit steals mana from the enemy with each attack, but must be kept safely from melee attacks due to its inferior combat capabilities.

records.name: Shielder
records.description: This highly defensive unit pushes the enemy backward with each attack. Create a barricade with several of these to keep your tower impenetrable.

records.name: Spearman
records.description: This unit attacks multiple enemies and pushes them backward. It is stronger in groups than when alone.

records.name: Rider
records.description: This advanced Cavalry provides a higher Movement Speed and enhanced combat capabilities.

records.name: Artillery
records.description: Shoots cannons to attack multiple enemies from a distance. This powerful shooter is effective against Shielders, Goblins, and Siege Golems, but vulnerable to melee attacks.

records.name: Bomber
records.description: This aerial unit bombards the enemy on the ground  but it is a sitting duck for aerial enemies, for it does not have an aerial attack.

records.name: Interceptor
records.description: This unit is the best at midair dogfights. Use it to shoot down Bombers, Queen Bees, and Wyvern Riders.

records.name: Medic
records.description: This healer unit ensures maximum defense when used in combination with Shielders and Infantry Officers.

records.name: Gun Cavalry
records.description: This horseback gunslinger is effective against defensive units. it also has a high survival rate as it automatically moves backward after each attack.

records.name: Infantry Officer
records.description: This unit is the best heavy infantryman of the Hume, providing Defense equal to that of the Shielder, along with high HP and reliable Attack Strength.

records.name: Battleship
records.description: This Hume flying fortress is excellent in both air-to-ground and anti-personnel attacks, and its bullets push enemies backward.

records.name: Knoll
records.description: The Knoll is very weak, but consumes the least amount of mana among all the units and races with a short Spawn Delay. Use it in large numbers in the beginning of a stage to overwhelm the enemy.

records.name: Minota
records.description: Moves slowly and consumes more mana than the Knoll, but makes up for it with its high Attack Strength.

records.name: Bunny
records.description: This unit inflicts damage on multiple enemies . It is stronger in groups than when alone.

records.name: Short hair
records.description: This unit moves and attacks at an extremely high speed. It is effective against the enemy's basic units, but inferior to heavy infantrymen.

records.name: Pigling
records.description: Charges at multiple enemies to inflict damage  and push them backward with its tusks. It is almost invincible when in groups.

records.name: Foxbow
records.description: This archer unit  is one of a few units of the Busters that are capable of aerial attacks.

records.name: Goblin
records.description: This unit self-destructs near enemies. Despite of its massive Attack Strength, you should use it only when many enemies are near, as it perishes after just one attack.

records.name: Big Hippo
records.description: A well-rounded unit with high HP, Defense, and a fast speed. Use it to keep the enemy at bay.

records.name: Harpy
records.description: This unit flies around and shoot arrow-like feathers.  Damange isn't too impressive, however.

records.name: Werewolf
records.description: This unit is the fastest among the normal units, use it to raid the enemy. It is inferior to heavy infantrymen like Infantry Officers and Siege Golems .

records.name: Rhino
records.description: This unit charges at multiple enemies to inflict great damage  and push them far away.

records.name: Salamander
records.description: This unit breathes fire to attack multiple enemies.  Use it to instantly finish a group of low-defense units.

records.name: Cyclops
records.description: Throws rocks at enemies from afar. This unit is effective against defensive units.

records.name: Queen Bee
records.description: This aerial unit delivers a kamikaze attack on the enemy hero upon detection, while fighting aerial and infantry units.

records.name: Shaman
records.description: This non-combat unit uses black magic to immobilize the enemy and turn their Defense into 0. It is especially effective against the enemy with only a small group  of advanced units.

records.name: Behemoth
records.description: Fists down the enemy and inflicts substantial damage.  It moves quickly, but its Attack Speed is slow; not an ideal unit against multiple enemies.

records.name: Slinger
records.description: This basic unit of the Elven delivers slingshot attacks. It has higher stats than the other basic units, but it consumes more mana to spawn.

records.name: Dendroid
records.description: Moves slowly, but provides high Defense. Use it to protect your Slingers, Arbalests, and Phalanxes.

records.name: Scout
records.description: This basic Elven horseman moves quickly to attack the enemy. It is stronger than the same unit of the other races, but it consumes more mana to spawn.

records.name: Arbalest
records.description: Shoots arrows at multiple enemies from afar. It is effective against defensive units like Panzers.

records.name: Phalanx
records.description: This elite Elven spearman inflicts damage on enemies within its range. While it is strong in groups, it is vulnerable to melee attacks.

records.name: Witch
records.description: Rides a broom and attacks the enemy from the air.  It moves quickly, but its Defense is low.

records.name: Swordmaster
records.description: Inflicts great damage at a high speed.  This skilled swordsman consumes a considerably high amount of MP.

records.name: Triali
records.description: This seasoned elite Phalanx  pushes multiple enemies backward with great damage.

records.name: Caster
records.description: Thhis unit uses curse spells to attack the enemy's long-ranged and support units.  Use it to counter Medics, Shamans, Bishops, and Artillery.

records.name: Griffin Rider
records.description: This interceptor unit uses its sharp talons to attack aerial units. Having high HP, it can also act as a shield against aerial attacks.

records.name: Siege Golem
records.description: This unit moves very slowly, but its Defense is so high  that it can endure almost all attacks from lesser offensive units.

records.name: Templar
records.description: This most elite heavy infantryman of the Elven provides outstanding Attack Strength and Defense at the cost of a great amount of mana.

records.name: Sagi
records.description: This ace archer of the Elven shoots powerful arrows from a very long distance, and it is effective against aerial and defensive units.

records.name: Archmage
records.description: This destructive unit can annihilate surrounding enemies with meteor attacks, but is vulnerable to melee attacks.

records.name: Wyvern Rider
records.description: This unit bombards infantry units  from the air. Its air-to-ground Attack Strength is comparable to the Hume Battleship, if not better.

records.name: Bishop
records.description: This unit casts buffs and restores HP for its friendly force. Team it up with advanced units for maximum performance.

records.name: Neive
records.description: An advanced Battleship.

records.name: Martin
records.description: This ultimate spearman with well-rounded attack and defense capabilities even has the ability to push the enemy backward.

records.name: Rose
records.description: This support unit can handle midair battles by itself for the Buster camp that has only a few aerial units.

records.name: Arang
records.description: This unit, being faster than Werewolf, can raid the enemy almost instantly,  but it is somewhat ineffective against defensive units.

records.name: Lantere
records.description: This unit is specialized in powerful double blows, and compensates the weakness of the Elven in melee combat with its high HP and adequate Defense.

records.name: Theon
records.description: Shoots lightning to attack multiple enemies, and especially good at finishing low-leveled units.
None
